expected cost-sharing amount in dollars that a beneficiary would be expected to pay at a network 
retail pharmacy for a one-month supply of drugs. This estimate should be based on available plan data 
(such as the most current 6 months of PDE data) for retail pharmacies only. Neither retail extended
